result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.SyntaxError) syntax error at or near "Case"
LINE 15:     FROM Case
                  ^

[SQL: 
WITH AgentTransfers AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id,
        COUNT("id") AS transfer_count
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE
        "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND
        "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND
        "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    GROUP BY 1
),
AgentsHandledCases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("ownerid", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM Case
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "ownerid" IS NOT NULL AND "ownerid" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("newvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "newvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "newvalue__c" != ''
)
SELECT
    ahc.agent_id
FROM
    AgentsHandledCases ahc
LEFT JOIN
    AgentTransfers at ON ahc.agent_id = at.agent_id
ORDER BY
    COALESCE(at.transfer_count, 0) ASC
LIMIT 1;
]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

WITH AgentTransfers AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id,
        COUNT("id") AS transfer_count
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE
        "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND
        "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND
        "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    GROUP BY 1
),
AgentsHandledCases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("ownerid", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM Case
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "ownerid" IS NOT NULL AND "ownerid" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("newvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id

WITH AgentTransfers AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id,
        COUNT("id") AS transfer_count
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE
        "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND
        "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND
        "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    GROUP BY 1
),
AgentsHandledCases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("ownerid", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM Case
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "ownerid" IS NOT NULL AND "ownerid" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("newvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "newvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "newvalue__c" != ''

args.query:
WITH AgentTransfers AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id,
        COUNT("id") AS transfer_count
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE
        "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND
        "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND
        "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    GROUP BY 1
),
AgentsHandledCases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("ownerid", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "ownerid" IS NOT NULL AND "ownerid" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("oldvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "oldvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "oldvalue__c" != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE("newvalue__c", '#', ''), '"', '')) AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE "createddate" BETWEEN '2022-04-10' AND '2023-04-10' AND "field__c" = 'OwnerId' AND "newvalue__c" IS NOT NULL AND "newvalue__c" != ''
)
SELECT
    ahc.agent_id
FROM
    AgentsHandledCases ahc
LEFT JOIN
    AgentTransfers at ON ahc.agent_id = at.agent_id
ORDER BY
    COALESCE(at.transfer_count, 0) ASC
LIMIT 1;
